title: Support  - App
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app Support > App section displays App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connected info with a "Go" button
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Tap on the menu icon or navigate to the Support section.
4. Tap on the 'App' subsection under Support.
5. Observe the displayed support details on the screen.
expected: The Support > App section displays the following details: App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connected info. A "Go" button is visible and tappable to proceed.
